source.reference: 8mm Mauser sS (schwere Spitzgeschoss) 198gr ball. G7 BC~0.265. Standard German service round both World Wars. Velocity ~760 m/s (29" barrel).
source.methodology: Values based on commonly published historical ballistics data for this military cartridge.

notes: Chamber pressure: 390 MPa. 8mm Mauser (7.92x57mm) rimless bottleneck cartridge.
